title: Better Crit Particles
description: Changes the crit particles to red Hearts
body:
## Better Crit Particles: Heart-Crit Particles

Redefine your combat style with a touch of dark irony. This pack replaces the standard critical hit sparks with **Blood Hearts**, turning every lethal blow into a haunting visual statement.

---
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5be0d70569d27f78e1610c13bf2b428c70b4a5f0_0.webp)
### Pack Features
* **The Heart of the Void:** Critical strikes now emit sharp, pixel-art hearts. The core is a deep, "Soulless" Red.
* **Psychological Edge:** Perfect for the "Void-Walker" who wants their enemies to see exactly where their life-force is being drained.
* **Stylized Combat:** Adds a unique, aesthetic flair to PvP and PvE that breaks away from the traditional spark design.
* **High-Contrast Feedback:** The dark heart shape is instantly recognizable against the terrain, providing clear visual confirmation of a successful critical hit.
